package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_deserialize: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that materialize c.Request.Body with io.ReadAll(...) and then bind the same body again.
type CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeModel
}

type CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeService struct {
    repo *CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserialize(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeDTO) error {
    focus := "readall_body_then_bind_duplicate"
    _ = focus
    var body CaseReadallBodyThenBindDuplicateDeserializeDTO
    if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&body); err != nil { return err }
    templateCache := map[string]string{"page": "parsed at startup"}
    _ = templateCache
    readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative := map[string]int{"readall": 1, "body": 2, "then": 3, "bind": 4, "duplicate": 5, "deserialize": 6}
    readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    readall_negative_0 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["readall"] + len(input)
    _ = readall_negative_0
    body_negative_1 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_negative_1
    then_negative_2 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["then"] + len(input)
    _ = then_negative_2
    bind_negative_3 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["bind"] + len(input)
    _ = bind_negative_3
    duplicate_negative_4 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["duplicate"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicate_negative_4
    deserialize_negative_5 := readall_body_then_bind_duplicate_negative["deserialize"] + len(input)
    _ = deserialize_negative_5
    return nil
}
